config_path.description: Path to an LLM cluster config JSON file with configured Ollama, OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic Claude, or Codex providers.

allowed_root.description: Directory that output_path must resolve inside.

output_path.description: Relative or allowed absolute path for generated output.

max_tokens.description: Optional Anthropic Messages API max_tokens override.

task_complexity.description: Optional caller or skill classification such as easy, standard, hard, or agentic. Current manager behavior still routes by requested model and configured provider availability.

routing_profile.description: Optional caller or skill routing hint such as easy, hard, or agentic. Current manager behavior still routes by requested model and configured provider availability.
